html: one of the personages in the poem of Solomon�s (Solomon 6:13) The name denotes a woman belonging to a place called Shulem, which is probably the same as Shunem. [SHUNEM] If, then, Shulamite and Shunammite are equivalent, we may conjecture that the Shunammite who was the object of Solomon�s passion was Abishag, the most lovely girl of her day, and at the time of David�s death the most prominent person at Jerusalem.
